title: Omni Extras: An Alien Evo Addonpack
description: An addon for the Alien Evolution mod that adds... extra aliens..
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48021c794130df49556cf3c93d64e082a4a7188c.png)
# Content 

This addonpack will add more aliens (canon to the original show) to the **Omnitrix** provided by **Alien Evolution!**

# Obtainment

**Opticoid:**

### First Method

On transforming into any alien, there is a random chance of transforming into an Opticoid

### Second Method

Craft an **Empty Vial**

![Recipe for the Empty Vial](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e92d6a59790f27f0fadeb098e8c8f4908c0c44a.png)

![a ruined galvan tower](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/910dc16d0da894a10814354ac186f71dc130cb65_0.webp)

Find the **Abandoned Lab** for Alien Goo (marked by the **Ruined Galvan Tower**)

![screenshot of the abandoned lab](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/abe16d673b233156ec59c34f5cfb7830fa298353_0.webp)

Right click the goo while holding an empty vial to obtain a **Filled Vial** (ALIEN GOO DOESN'T DROP FROM BREAKING IT, BE CAREFUL)

![player holding an empty vial while looking at alien goo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/105b4168cc8a750d64a407a94554fe40430e39e9_0.webp)

Cook the **Filled Vial** inside a furnace to obtain the DNA Vial

![Screenshot of a Filled Vial being cooked inside a furnace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/45d5331cc6d34515e63b68e4fd9c0e9d46ae657b.png)![Screenshot of the end result of cooking a Filled Vial in a furnace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/30f6aaab6326065a5388be651dad3d61307009e7.png)

Right click the DNA Vial while having an Omnitrix to unlock the **Opticoid** transformation

![Screenshot of the Omnitrix showing a sillhouette of an Opticoid](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1193f63d50a0bbe9ed7e903378cfe0aa8525a0e3_0.webp)

**Gourmand:**

![a spaceship crashed into an iceberg](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc5226f0231a18e9e02581350db5e8f7ea253653_0.webp)

Stumble upon the **Mysterious Ship** and find **The Deliverer** inside

![a man encountering the deliverer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9b7b7935e83a35d5de40643f09684f5bd96f98dd_0.webp)

Interact with her while wielding an **Omnitrix** and you will obtain the **Gourmand** transformation (50/50 chance of it being Perk or Murk)

![a gourmand shooting its spit to the sky](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a744218f6643628a80c884803ebce60bc1b5f159_0.webp)

The tablet is no longer needed to obtain **Gourmand** but there is a chance of unlocking the other variant you don't currently have if you decide to consume it as a **Gourmand**.

**Talpaedan:**

Find the **Crashsite** containing  ???

![a structure looking like a chocolate orange with a  mysterious creature residing on the right](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/46c5ae37841fb8c66794ac2543728f7021718d09_0.webp)

### First Method

Dig up **Grounded Mystery Scrap** by using a brush on the suspicious sand

![brushing suspicious sand](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cbaa21a346573beb15b218c2711fb8260bdfedc3_0.webp)

Smelt the **Grounded Mystery Scrap** in a Blast Furnace to obtain **Andrium**

![andrium smelting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/37fc59e9468db88ed3257a5008b97c54600c62df_0.webp)

Put the **Andrium** in a Crafting Table alongside **Titanium, Vibranium, Netherite Scrap** to make a **Virandium Plate**

![virandium plate recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b830934c2f2d3e6bef7e058836c9b0367cd49ba.png)

Mix **Yellow Dye** and a **Virandium Plate** to make a **Yellow Virandium Plate**

![yellow virandium plate recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/977616db2ff1379d11934fbc1aa33659f30dae3e.png)

Give the **Yellow Virandium Plates** to the Mysterious Creature on site (requires 10x **Yellow Virandium Plates**)

![giving the plates to the creature](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f8d21c6a8cbdfeef2cd41b435c057e4aef2e7102_0.webp)

![after giving 10x plates, he looks much better](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/08e25dd702e8a657d89a9a802c4315b1ddd6df49_0.webp)

Then interact with him while holding nothing in your hand and wielding an **Omnitrix** (Note: if you attack him even once, he will no longer trust you and no longer accept anything from you)

### Second Method

Kill the creature while wielding an **Omnitrix**

**Nosedeenian (uninstall the [Nosedeenian: Buzzshock AlienEvo AddonPack ](https://modrinth.com/mod/buzzshock) since this directly replaces the one from that addon):**

Find a **Megawatt** in the wild (spawns from lightning strikes in rainy/thundering weather)

![a swarm of megawatts](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f0f5a3131de32b7808d64d355ed561513366b29_0.webp)

Kill the **Megawatt** while wielding an Omnitrix (note: **Megawatts** will duplicate everytime they are attacked and above half their health)

Further information is in our [Discord!](https://discord.gg/azVUsj6DJb)

# Other Aliens
**Orishan (UNFINISHED):**
- COMING SOON

**Amperi (UNFINISHED):**
- COMING SOON

# Commands 
Optional but necessary for people that want to use **Eye-Guy (Opticoid)** and **Buzzshock (Nosedeenian)** and are updating from the previous version

- fixmylevels - this acts as a reset skillpoints button (automatically locks all skills and sets ur skillpoints to match your level)

# Dependencies

- [Palladium](https://modrinth.com/mod/threetag-palladium)
- [KubeJS](https://modrinth.com/mod/kubejs)
- [GeckoLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)
- [Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api)
- [Pehkui](https://modrinth.com/mod/pehkui)
- [Rhino](https://modrinth.com/mod/rhino)
- [Alien Evolution 1.1](https://modrinth.com/mod/alienevo)
